_comment: schema: name, description, rarity (weight: larger=more common; 1.0 abundant, 0.5 common, 0.1 uncommon, 0.05 rare, 0.005 legendary, 0.0001 mythic), difficulty (1-10), biomes (optional, restricts to biomes), waters (optional: ocean|lake|pond|well), effect (optional buff string), joke (optional bool, junk/treasure), price (optional flat sell-price override).

name: mirror carp
description: scattered scales like coins on its flank.

name: leather carp
description: smooth and scaleless, hugs the muck.

name: goldfish
description: Atlantean diplomat, exiled from the deep cities to live in your glass bowls. Goldfish remember everything.

name: arctic char
description: circumpolar courier. Arctic char carry Fis's wisdom across the polar circuits — the patterns on their flanks are sentences if you know how to read.

name: atlantic salmon
description: leaper, king of the cold north.

name: northern pike
description: all teeth and ambush. Ish keeps a stable of pike in her desert court; she sharpens her hate on their jaws.

name: channel catfish
description: forked-tail bottom feeder. Catfish keep the mud-tablets, on which every Atlantean dynasty is written, erased, rewritten.

name: bowfin
description: living fossil. Bowfin watched the Fallen Fish fall UPWARDS onto Sentinel, and they have not forgiven it.

name: sturgeon
description: armored relic of an older river.

name: white sturgeon
description: pacific giant, older than Sentinel itself. Khei was still steam when the first sturgeon learned to wait.

name: arapaima
description: armored amazon leviathan. Atlantean architects model their monuments on its plating — proof the dry world copies the wet, not the other way.

name: electric eel
description: shockingly large. Ish's torturers; each volt is a bottled echo of her wrath.

name: american eel
description: twisting and slippery. Eels carry messages between Atlantean cities — slit one and you may find a scroll, written in a script that bites you back.

name: atlantic cod
description: the fish that built the new world.

name: anglerfish
description: luminous lure in the dark. Fish himself lit the first angler's lantern; where they swim is where Atlantean territory begins.

name: gulper eel
description: stomach the size of its body.

name: lamprey
description: rasping mouth, alarming hug. Lampreys never forgave Fish for binding the Fallen Fish; they remain the rebellion's loyalists.

name: bluefin tuna
description: colossal sushi-grade king. Bluefin are the Celestial Dragons — the royal bloodline of Coelacanth, born of the Five Elders. Every other fish kneels. To land one is regicide.

name: blue marlin
description: billed missile of the open sea.

name: swordfish
description: long-billed deep diver. Each swordfish is one of Ish's sharpened curses, loosed into salt water with somewhere to be.

name: mahi-mahi
description: dolphinfish, golden flash. Heralds of Ish; when they school near shore the desert pantheon is taking notice of someone.

name: cobia
description: ling, the king of the coast.

name: bonefish
description: the grey ghost of the flats.

name: redfish
description: spot on the tail, fight in the heart.

name: coelacanth
description: thought extinct since the dinosaurs. Closest living kin of Fish himself. Five of them form the Five Elders — the ruling council of Atlantis — and the rest are their kin. They alone remember the dry years and what Sentinel cost Khei to raise.

name: tiger shark
description: striped giant of the warm seas.

name: great white shark
description: ocean's apex. Ish's enforcer in salt water — she sends great whites to remind Atlantis who answers to whom.

name: thresher shark
description: tail as long as the body.

name: electric ray
description: torpedo ray, a shock at the bottom.

name: giant pacific octopus
description: biggest of the octopuses. Chief librarians of Atlantis: nine hearts to feel, eight arms to write, one mouth sworn to silence.

name: giant squid
description: kraken of bedtime stories. The Atlantean carceral system: traitors are wrapped, dragged down, and never speak again.

name: orca
description: killer whale, apex of the sea. Ish's hunting packs. They sing the names of those marked for the deep.

name: humpback whale
description: singer of the deeps. Their song predates your language — it praises Khei from before there was a Sentinel for her to raise.

name: manatee
description: sea cow of the warm coast.

name: bladderfish
description: subnautica: floats like a sad balloon.

name: oculus
description: subnautica: yet more eye than fish.

name: ampeel
description: subnautica: electric whip of the trench.

name: reaper leviathan
description: subnautica: jawed terror of the dunes.

name: cryptosuchus
description: below zero: crocodile of the lily pads.

name: lily paddler
description: below zero: hops between thermal pools.

name: double cod
description: terraria: two cod for the price of one.

name: dynamite fish
description: terraria: do not, repeat, do not shake.

name: truffle worm
description: terraria: bait for the duke himself.

name: swordfish (terraria)
description: terraria: a sword you can swing.

name: sawtooth shark (terraria)
description: terraria: a saw with a shark wrapped on it.

name: elder guardian
description: minecraft: monument boss with mining fatigue.

name: old tire
description: junk: how did this get here.

name: broken sunglasses
description: junk: half a pair of cool.

name: spoon
description: junk: the spoon does not exist.

name: amber chunk
description: treasure: ancient resin with a bug inside.

name: ancient coin
description: treasure: a thousand years of patina.

name: captain's hat
description: treasure: a relic of the deeps.

name: shipwreck plank
description: treasure: wood from a doomed boat.

name: Fishfish
description: MYTHIC: a fish of pure fish. +10% sell price forever.

name: Rodfish
description: MYTHIC: the rod-shaped fish. Your next rod is free.

name: Sharpfish
description: MYTHIC: focuses your mind. +500 fishing xp.

name: Bloomfish
description: MYTHIC: spreads your reach. +1 max bobber distance forever.

name: Quickfish
description: MYTHIC: leaps faster than you can blink. +5% movement speed.

name: Luckyfish
description: MYTHIC: fortune incarnate. +5% rare catch chance.

name: Gilded Goldfish
description: LEGENDARY: a goldfish of solid gold. +50% valu per catch.

name: Patience Fish
description: MYTHIC: shortens every future bite-wait. -10% wait time.

name: Fish
description: THE FISH. Ineffable, irreducible, the deity. Closest of kin to the coelacanth and indestructible. The land you call Gaia has a truer name — Khei — and only Fish would say it aloud. When you forge The Fishing Rod with him he is not consumed, he is not lost; he simply permits it. You are not his owner. He owns you.

name: Ish
description: ISH, GODDESS OF ANGER. Aspect of Fish, embodiment of the desert biome. The lower cultures of your reality know her as Ishtar of Mesopotamia. Every pantheon you were ever taught is a misremembering of ours. Caught one in a thousand among the dunes. Required to forge The Rod.

name: Fsh
description: FSH, GOD OF CURIOSITY. Aspect of Fish, embodiment of the forest biome. THE PANTHEON: Fish is the deity. Ish, Fsh, Fih, Fis are his split emotions — Anger, Curiosity, Happiness, Wiseness. I have given up my life to inform you, player. Assemble us. You must become THE fisherman.

name: Fih
description: FIH, GOD OF HAPPINESS, two-legged like you. The first joke was Fish watching his children stand upright. You are the descendants of the Fallen Fish — who fell UPWARDS onto Sentinel and rebelled against grandfather Fish. The swamp giggles because it remembers. Required to forge The Rod.

name: Fis
description: FIS, GOD OF WISENESS. Aspect of Fish, embodiment of the tundra. You fish because humanity numbers fewer than a thousand and has never needed agriculture. Fishing is the shield. Atlantis is real and its dynasties are older than your speech. Required to forge The Rod.

name: Fallen Fish
description: THE FALLEN FISH. Grandfather to all standing things. When Khei still steamed and Sentinel was new, he fell UPWARDS out of the sea and rebelled against Fish. He seeded the men. He is in your blood. To catch him is to catch yourself. He waits in the lakebed caves, between worlds.

_comment: SEWER pool. Pool tag 'sewer'. Tier-1 dim — low-difficulty trash fish + a couple oddities.

name: drain rat
description: Wet, displeased. Less a fish than a misunderstanding.

name: albino guppy
description: Has lived its entire life in the dark.

name: white-eyed eel
description: Eyes long since washed pale by the runoff.

name: sewer pike
description: Long and unwell. The teeth are concerning.

_comment: HOT SPRING pool. Tier-5 dim. Steam-loving species, mostly small but valuable.

name: soaking koi
description: Has decided this is the only acceptable temperature.

name: steam-veiled char
description: Visible only when the steam parts.

name: magma minnow
description: Apparently flame-resistant. You'd rather not ask.

_comment: PYRAMID pool. Tier-15 dim. Ancient, mummified, valuable.

name: mummified sand-eel
description: Linen-wrapped and very dry. Still moving, somehow.

name: sand-fed catfish
description: Hunts in the dunes between the chambers.

name: pharaoh's carp
description: Adorned in gold leaf. Once swam in royal pools.

_comment: SWAMP CAVE pool. Tier-20 dim. Dim, peat-coloured, full of teeth.

name: peat-water gar
description: Long, slow, patient. Smells of bog.

name: wisp-eyed eel
description: Its eyes glow faintly. You feel observed.

_comment: BOG CATHEDRAL pool. Tier-40 dim. Things that drowned where they prayed.

name: hellbender
description: Real species, unfortunate name. Massive aquatic salamander.

name: vesper fish
description: Appears only between the bell tolls.

name: altar carp
description: Polished gold scales. Sacred and angry.

_comment: MIRROR LAKE pool. Tier-60 dim. Reflective shimmer; doppelganger fish.

name: doppelganger trout
description: Copies your last cast back at you.

name: still-water bass
description: Strikes only when the surface is undisturbed.

name: looking-glass koi
description: Reflective scales. You see your own face in its side.

name: mirror leviathan
description: Filled the whole lake in the reflection. Real-side, much smaller.

_comment: ICESHELF pool. Tier-75 dim. Cold-adapted; ice-fishing classics + extremes.

name: polar cod
description: Built for the freezing dark below the ice.

name: ice-skin halibut
description: Frost crystallises on its dorsal as you pull it up.

name: the Thing
description: Pulled from a hole you don't remember drilling.

_comment: WRECKAGE pool. Tier-30 dim. Ship-bound oddities + literal loot.

name: cargo eel
description: Hides in the hull's flooded crates.

name: barnacle bass
description: Encrusted to the point of asymmetry.

name: lost gold bar
description: Heavy. Marked with a sigil no one alive recognises.

_comment: CRATER pool. Tier-130 dim. Cosmic fish — overlaps thematically with the existing cosmic variants.

name: stardust koi
description: Trails motes of stardust as it swims.

name: comet pike
description: Streaks across the pool in a blue arc.

name: nebula leviathan
description: A galaxy in fin-form. Far too large to be the same one twice.

_comment: COLOSSEUM pool. Tier-90 dim. Gladiator-class fish; arena-themed.

name: gladiator bass
description: Scarred along the flank from generations of fighting.

name: spectator goldfish
description: Watches you fight with the same fish from inside the pit.

name: champion's catfish
description: Carries a silver wreath. Has eaten three challengers.

name: the Editor
description: Decides who lives. You hooked it. Now what?

_comment: ALL BLUE pool. Tier-180 endgame dim. Catches anything in the game plus a couple of unique apex fish.

name: azure leviathan
description: The deepest blue you've ever seen. Older than the surface.

name: the bluest blue
description: Pure colour. You aren't sure it has a body.

name: ocean's first
description: The first fish. Still alive. It remembers Khei.

_comment: DIVERSITY PASS 1 — freshwater coregonids, cyprinids, perches, sticklebacks. No biome lock so they fill lake/pond rolls across the map.
DIVERSITY PASS 2 — Tundra cold-water locals.
DIVERSITY PASS 3 — Desert lake/pond endemics.
DIVERSITY PASS 4 — Rocky biome stream darters and stoneflies.
DIVERSITY PASS 5 — Scrub biome prairie minnows.
DIVERSITY PASS 6 — Swamp blackwater specialists.
DIVERSITY PASS 7 — Meadow lowland classics.

name: sun bleak
description: schools at the surface in sun.

_comment: DIVERSITY PASS 8 — Forest stream natives.
DIVERSITY PASS 9 — Pelagic + reef ocean diversity. Fills Clear/Cloudy/Windy/Heat Wave for the ocean roll.

name: anchovy
description: silver bait of every other fish.

_comment: LAKEBED CAVE pool. Subterranean flooded-cave species — only roll from inside the lakebed dim. Stygobitic / hypogean / blind-cave fauna.
FOG SEA pool. Only reachable past hull-tier-5 ocean depth (>32 tiles offshore). Endgame ghost-themed roster — pale, half-real, deep-blue fauna. Hard, valuable, mostly diff 8-10.

name: ghost mackerel
description: translucent flank; you see the line through it.

name: wraith herring
description: schools that pass through the hull.

name: fog-wraith eel
description: long ribbon of mist with teeth.

name: spectral tuna
description: you weigh nothing on the line until it bites.

name: phantom marlin
description: the bill is real, the rest you're not so sure.

name: drowned man's fin
description: human-shaped fluke. Don't look at the eyes.

name: fog leviathan
description: you only know the size by the wake.

name: ghost squid
description: ink that doesn't darken the water.

name: pale hagfish
description: every fold of its body argues with itself.

name: deathveil cod
description: scales soft as breath. Mournful catch.

name: lost shark
description: circles the wrong way. Doesn't see you.

name: the Witness
description: watches every cast. Catching it is being seen.

_comment: DIVERSITY PASS 10 — Meadow lowland ponds + slow streams.

name: mimic shiner
description: tiny silver, schools tight to cover.

_comment: DIVERSITY PASS 11 — Forest stream darters, madtoms, sunfish.
DIVERSITY PASS 12 — Rocky mountain-stream cold-water specialists.
DIVERSITY PASS 13 — Scrub prairie + arid grassland warm-water specialists.
